---
title: "Comparing Set 3 to Set 4 - RNAseq Data "
params:                              
  experiment_id: S3_S4_COMP
  author: "Shalise Burch"
  date: "2026-02-17"
output: html_document  
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    echo: TRUE        
    warning: FALSE     
    message: FALSE   
---

SAB01 -> SET 3
SAB08 -> SET 4

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# UPDATED:
# 2026-02-17 17:07 SAB ------------------------------
# 2026-02-18 15:48 SAB ------------------------------ rerun with new SAB08 DEGS after combining runs

library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

exp_name <- params$experiment_id
results_path <- here("rnaseq", "S3_S4_COMP", "results")
rdata_path <- here("rnaseq", "S3_S4_COMP", "rdata")
source(here("rnaseq", exp_name, "functions.R"))

day_use  <- "D4"
lfc_col <- "log2FoldChange_raw"   
padj_cut <- 0.05
lfc_cut  <- 0.5

save_dir <- file.path(results_path, day_use)
make_subdir(save_dir)


#load data 
SAB01_all <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB01/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB01_DEG_unfiltered_ALL.rds")
SAB08_all <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB08/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB08_DEG_unfiltered_ALL.rds")

```

# D4 T21_RA_vs_D21_RA
## -- Pull data
```{r}
contrast <- "T21_RA_vs_D21_RA"

# SAB01 SET3
sab01_df <- get_day_df(SAB01_all, contrast, day_use)
sab01_degs <- filter_deg_genes(sab01_df, padj_cut, lfc_cut, lfc_col)

# SAB08 SET4
sab08_df <- get_day_df(SAB08_all, contrast, day_use)
sab08_degs <- filter_deg_genes(sab08_df, padj_cut, lfc_cut, lfc_col)
```

## -- overlap DEGS 
```{r}
overlap_sets <- function(x, y) {
  list(
    shared = intersect(x, y),
    SAB01_only = setdiff(x, y),
    SAB08_only = setdiff(y, x)
  )
}


A_all  <- overlap_sets(sab01_degs$all,  sab08_degs$all)
A_up   <- overlap_sets(sab01_degs$up,   sab08_degs$up)
A_down <- overlap_sets(sab01_degs$down, sab08_degs$down)


#identify  inconsistent genes
consistent_genes_A <- c(A_up$shared, A_down$shared)
inconsistent_genes_A <- setdiff(A_all$shared, consistent_genes_A)

#summary table
summary_table <- tibble::tibble(
  contrast = contrast,
  
  sab01_degs = length(sab01_degs$all),
  sab08_degs = length(sab08_degs$all),
  shared_all = length(A_all$shared),

  shared_up = length(A_up$shared), 
  shared_down = length(A_down$shared)
)

print(summary_table)

cat("Shared (direction-consistent) at", day_use, ":", length(consistent_genes_A), "\n")
cat("Shared (inconsistent) at", day_use, ":", length(inconsistent_genes_A), "\n", head(inconsistent_genes_A))

```

```{r}
out <- list(
  day = day_use,
  lfc_col = lfc_col,
  filters = list(padj_cut = padj_cut, lfc_cut = lfc_cut),
  A_T21RA_vs_D21RA = list(  all = A_all, up = A_up, down = A_down, consistent = consistent_genes_A, inconsistent = inconsistent_genes_A))


file_name <- paste0(exp_name, "_", day_use, "_", contrast, "_overlap_", Sys.Date(), ".rds")

saveRDS(out, file = file.path(rdata_path, file_name))
```

##-- save data
```{r excel}
library(writexl)

excel_list <- list(
  Summary = summary_table,
  A_shared_all = data.frame(gene = A_all$shared),
  A_shared_up = data.frame(gene = A_up$shared),
  A_shared_down = data.frame(gene = A_down$shared),
  A_inconsistent = data.frame(gene = inconsistent_genes_A))

excel_file <- file.path(save_dir,
                         paste0(exp_name, "_", day_use,"_", contrast, "_overlap_summary_", Sys.Date(), ".xlsx"))

write_xlsx(excel_list, excel_file)
```


```{r pdf summary}
pdf_file <- file.path(,
                      paste0(exp_name, "_", day_use,"_", contrast, "_overlap_counts_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"))

pdf(pdf_file, width = 8, height = 6)

plot.new()

text(0.1, 0.9, paste(day_use," DEG Overlap Summary"), adj = 0, cex = 1.4)

text(0.1, 0.8, paste("Contrast:", contrast), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.75, paste("SAB01 DEGs:", length(sab01_degs$all)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.7, paste("SAB08 DEGs:", length(sab08_degs$all)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.65, paste("Shared (all):", length(A_all$shared)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.6, paste("Shared (up):", length(A_up$shared)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.55, paste("Shared (down):", length(A_down$shared)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.45, paste("Inconsistent direction:", length(inconsistent_genes_A)), adj = 0)

dev.off()
```

## -- annotate gene themes
```{r}
pathway_sets <- readRDS(file.path(rdata_path, "annot_pathway_sets_v2026.rds"))
# Chromosome - using gene chrom map used previously
gene_to_chrom <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB01/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB01_gene_to_chrom.rds")

# Add direction to annotation table
gene_col <- sab01_degs$gene_col

lfc_table <- sab01_df %>%
  select(gene = all_of(gene_col),
         log2FC = log2FoldChange_raw)

annot_table <- data.frame(gene = consistent_genes_A) %>%
  left_join(lfc_table, by = c("gene" = "gene")) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(log2FC > 0, "Up_in_T21", "Down_in_T21"))

#chrom annotation
annot_table <- annot_table %>%
  left_join(gene_to_chrom, by = c("gene" = "gene_id")) %>%
  mutate(chr21 = chrom == "chr21")
#annotated table for pathways and TFs 
annot_table <- annot_table %>%
  mutate(
    RA_core = gene %in% pathway_sets$RA_core,
    Hedgehog = gene %in% pathway_sets$Hedgehog,
    WNT = gene %in% pathway_sets$WNT,
    TGFb = gene %in% pathway_sets$TGFb,
    Notch = gene %in% pathway_sets$Notch,
    TF = gene %in% pathway_sets$TF,
    Chromatin = gene %in% pathway_sets$Chromatin
  )


annot_file <- file.path(,
  paste0(exp_name, "_", day_use, "_", contrast, "_ANNOTATED.xlsx"))

write_xlsx(list(D4_annotated = annot_table), annot_file)
```

```{r}

res_T21RA_vs_D21RA <- list(
  contrast = contrast,
  sab01_degs = sab01_degs,
  sab08_degs = sab08_degs,
  overlap_all = A_all,
  overlap_up  = A_up,
  overlap_down = A_down,
  consistent = consistent_genes_A,
  inconsistent = inconsistent_genes_A
)

```

##  Print Summary 
```{r Summary}
total_genes <- nrow(annot_table)

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat(day_use, " Annotation Summary\n")
cat(contrast, "\n")
cat("==============================\n\n")

cat("Total Genes:", total_genes, "\n\n")

cat("Direction:\n")
cat("  Up in T21:   ", sum(annot_table$direction == "Up_in_T21", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Down in T21: ", sum(annot_table$direction == "Down_in_T21", na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")

cat("Chromosome:\n")
cat("  Chr21: ", sum(annot_table$chr21, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")

cat("Pathway / Theme Flags:\n")
cat("  RA_core:   ", sum(annot_table$RA_core, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Hedgehog:  ", sum(annot_table$Hedgehog, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  WNT:       ", sum(annot_table$WNT, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  TGFb:      ", sum(annot_table$TGFb, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Notch:     ", sum(annot_table$Notch, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  TF:        ", sum(annot_table$TF, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Chromatin: ", sum(annot_table$Chromatin, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

cat("\n==============================\n")
```

# D4 D21_RA_vs_CTRL
## -- Pull data
```{r}
contrast <- "D21_RA_vs_D21_CTRL"

# SAB01 SET3
sab01_df <- get_day_df(SAB01_all, contrast, day_use)
sab01_degs <- filter_deg_genes(sab01_df, padj_cut, lfc_cut, lfc_col)

# SAB08 SET4
sab08_df <- get_day_df(SAB08_all, contrast, day_use)
sab08_degs <- filter_deg_genes(sab08_df, padj_cut, lfc_cut, lfc_col)
```

## -- overlap DEGS 
```{r}
overlap_sets <- function(x, y) {
  list(
    shared = intersect(x, y),
    SAB01_only = setdiff(x, y),
    SAB08_only = setdiff(y, x)
  )
}


A_all  <- overlap_sets(sab01_degs$all,  sab08_degs$all)
A_up   <- overlap_sets(sab01_degs$up,   sab08_degs$up)
A_down <- overlap_sets(sab01_degs$down, sab08_degs$down)


#identify  inconsistent genes
consistent_genes_A <- c(A_up$shared, A_down$shared)
inconsistent_genes_A <- setdiff(A_all$shared, consistent_genes_A)

#summary table
summary_table <- tibble::tibble(
  contrast = contrast,
  
  sab01_degs = length(sab01_degs$all),
  sab08_degs = length(sab08_degs$all),
  shared_all = length(A_all$shared),

  shared_up = length(A_up$shared), 
  shared_down = length(A_down$shared)
)

print(summary_table)

cat("Shared (direction-consistent) at", day_use, ":", length(consistent_genes_A), "\n")
cat("Shared (inconsistent) at", day_use, ":", length(inconsistent_genes_A), "\n", head(inconsistent_genes_A))

```

```{r}
out <- list(
  day = day_use,
  lfc_col = lfc_col,
  filters = list(padj_cut = padj_cut, lfc_cut = lfc_cut),
  A_T21RA_vs_D21RA = list(  all = A_all, up = A_up, down = A_down, consistent = consistent_genes_A, inconsistent = inconsistent_genes_A))


file_name <- paste0(exp_name, "_", day_use, "_", contrast, "_overlap_", Sys.Date(), ".rds")

saveRDS(out, file = file.path(rdata_path, file_name))
```

##-- save data
```{r excel}
library(writexl)

excel_list <- list(
  Summary = summary_table,
  A_shared_all = data.frame(gene = A_all$shared),
  A_shared_up = data.frame(gene = A_up$shared),
  A_shared_down = data.frame(gene = A_down$shared),
  A_inconsistent = data.frame(gene = inconsistent_genes_A))

excel_file <- file.path(,
                         paste0(exp_name, "_", day_use,"_", contrast, "_overlap_summary_", Sys.Date(), ".xlsx"))

write_xlsx(excel_list, excel_file)
```


```{r pdf summary}
pdf_file <- file.path(,
                      paste0(exp_name, "_", day_use,"_", contrast, "_overlap_counts_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"))

pdf(pdf_file, width = 8, height = 6)

plot.new()

text(0.1, 0.9, paste(day_use," DEG Overlap Summary"), adj = 0, cex = 1.4)

text(0.1, 0.8, paste("Contrast:", contrast), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.75, paste("SAB01 DEGs:", length(sab01_degs$all)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.7, paste("SAB08 DEGs:", length(sab08_degs$all)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.65, paste("Shared (all):", length(A_all$shared)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.6, paste("Shared (up):", length(A_up$shared)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.55, paste("Shared (down):", length(A_down$shared)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.45, paste("Inconsistent direction:", length(inconsistent_genes_A)), adj = 0)

dev.off()
```

## -- annotate gene themes
```{r}
pathway_sets <- readRDS(file.path(rdata_path, "annot_pathway_sets_v2026.rds"))
# Chromosome - using gene chrom map used previously
gene_to_chrom <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB01/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB01_gene_to_chrom.rds")

# Add direction to annotation table
gene_col <- sab01_degs$gene_col

lfc_table <- sab01_df %>%
  select(gene = all_of(gene_col),
         log2FC = log2FoldChange_raw)

annot_table <- data.frame(gene = consistent_genes_A) %>%
  left_join(lfc_table, by = c("gene" = "gene")) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(log2FC > 0, "Up_in_RA", "Down_in_RA"))

#chrom annotation
annot_table <- annot_table %>%
  left_join(gene_to_chrom, by = c("gene" = "gene_id")) %>%
  mutate(chr21 = chrom == "chr21")
#annotated table for pathways and TFs 
annot_table <- annot_table %>%
  mutate(
    RA_core = gene %in% pathway_sets$RA_core,
    Hedgehog = gene %in% pathway_sets$Hedgehog,
    WNT = gene %in% pathway_sets$WNT,
    TGFb = gene %in% pathway_sets$TGFb,
    Notch = gene %in% pathway_sets$Notch,
    TF = gene %in% pathway_sets$TF,
    Chromatin = gene %in% pathway_sets$Chromatin
  )


annot_file <- file.path(,
  paste0(exp_name, "_", day_use, "_", contrast, "_ANNOTATED.xlsx"))

write_xlsx(list(D4_annotated = annot_table), annot_file)
```

```{r}

res_D21RA_vs_CTRL <- list(
  contrast = contrast,
  sab01_degs = sab01_degs,
  sab08_degs = sab08_degs,
  overlap_all = A_all,
  overlap_up  = A_up,
  overlap_down = A_down,
  consistent = consistent_genes_A,
  inconsistent = inconsistent_genes_A
)

```

##  Print Summary 
```{r Summary}
total_genes <- nrow(annot_table)

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat(day_use, " Annotation Summary\n")
cat(contrast, "\n")
cat("==============================\n\n")

cat("Total Genes:", total_genes, "\n\n")

cat("Direction:\n")
cat("  Up in RA:   ", sum(annot_table$direction == "Up_in_RA", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Down in RA: ", sum(annot_table$direction == "Down_in_RA", na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")

cat("Chromosome:\n")
cat("  Chr21: ", sum(annot_table$chr21, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")

cat("Pathway / Theme Flags:\n")
cat("  RA_core:   ", sum(annot_table$RA_core, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Hedgehog:  ", sum(annot_table$Hedgehog, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  WNT:       ", sum(annot_table$WNT, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  TGFb:      ", sum(annot_table$TGFb, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Notch:     ", sum(annot_table$Notch, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  TF:        ", sum(annot_table$TF, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Chromatin: ", sum(annot_table$Chromatin, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

cat("\n==============================\n")
```


# Overlap 
```{r}
contrast_overlap <- overlap_sets(
  res_T21RA_vs_D21RA$consistent,
  res_D21RA_vs_CTRL$consistent
)

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat(day_use, "CROSS-CONTRAST OVERLAP (consistent genes)\n")
cat("==============================\n")
cat("Shared:", length(contrast_overlap$shared), "\n")
cat("Only genotype-effect (T21RA vs D21RA):", length(contrast_overlap$SAB01_only), "\n")
cat("Only RA-response in D21 (D21RA vs CTRL):", length(contrast_overlap$SAB08_only), "\n")
cat("Example shared genes:\n")
print(head(contrast_overlap$shared, 30))

```
```{r}

cross_excel <- list(
  Summary = tibble::tibble(
    contrast1 = res_T21RA_vs_D21RA$contrast,
    contrast2 = res_D21RA_vs_CTRL$contrast,
    n1 = length(res_T21RA_vs_D21RA$consistent),
    n2 = length(res_D21RA_vs_CTRL$consistent),
    shared = length(contrast_overlap$shared)
  ),
  Shared = data.frame(gene = contrast_overlap$shared),
  Only_T21RA_vs_D21RA = data.frame(gene = contrast_overlap$SAB01_only),
  Only_D21RA_vs_CTRL  = data.frame(gene = contrast_overlap$SAB08_only))

write_xlsx(cross_excel,
  file.path(, paste0(exp_name, "_", day_use, "_crossContrast_overlap_", Sys.Date(), ".xlsx")))

```
